response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: It's a live VTuber concert. 2. Identified Song 1: 'WAO!!', performed by Ririka and Towa. Found original artist DECO*27. 3. Identified Song 2: 'FACT', performed by Ririka and Towa. Text on-screen confirmed lyrics/composition by 'niki'. 4. Performed searches for both songs' lyrics. 5. Extracted lyrics and formatted them into the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by VTubers Ichijou Ririka and Tokoyami Towa at a birthday festival event, featuring the songs 'WAO!!' and 'FACT'.

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka and Tokoyami Towa perform 'WAO!!' on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もうきみの心チクっとしちゃえ
わおーん！
「絶対無理」思っちゃうし
だって だって 不安になるし
全然嘘つけないし
だって だって バカ真っ直ぐだし
目指すキラキラもきっとぼく次第だ
ビター？
ギブアップなんて言わないんだから
WAO!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Make your heart prickle
Waoon!
'That's impossible' I think
Because, because I get anxious
I can't tell any lies
Because, because I'm stupidly honest
The sparkle I'm aiming for is surely up to me too
Bitter?
I won't say I'll give up
WAO!!
